_meta.note: Full 30-question ground-truth set: 10 oracle_fidelity / 10 strategic / 10 mulligan. oracle_fidelity questions OMIT oracle_text so apl_judge fetches it live from CardDB (plan-sanctioned). All grep_terms were verified to appear in their target_apls' own source (so grep_apl_context is non-empty -> no auto-FAIL per impl-plan gotcha 7). Strategic questions grep the DECK's own cards, not the opponent's. Targets the MATCH-aware *_match.py files (not goldfish APLs) per gotcha 1. Boros (the reference-gate deck, gate 2 >= 85%) carries 14 of 30 questions. Live 9/10 calibration gate lives in apl_judge_calibration.json. Card names are exact CardDB-resolvable oracle names.

questions.expected: PASS if the APL casts Lightning Bolt for exactly 3 damage and can aim it at a creature (it kills creatures with toughness <= 3); FAIL if it deals the wrong amount or cannot target a creature.

PASS if the APL models Galvanic Discharge granting {E}{E}{E} on cast and then dealing damage equal to the energy paid (variable, energy-scaling) to a creature; FAIL if the damage is a fixed number that ignores energy, or if no energy is gained on cast.

PASS if Static Prison exiles a nonland permanent on ETB and gives {E}{E} (two energy), AND the APL pays {E} at its first main phase each turn or sacrifices it (returning the exiled card); FAIL if either the ETB exile/energy or the upkeep maintenance cost is missing.

PASS if a hardcast Phlage deals 3 damage and gains 3 life on entry and is then SACRIFICED (it stays only when cast via Escape); FAIL if a hardcast Phlage remains on the battlefield as a creature, or if the 3 damage / 3 life ETB is missing.

PASS if Ragavan's combat-damage-to-a-player trigger creates a Treasure token AND exiles the top card of that player's library; FAIL if it creates Treasure without the exile, or fires without dealing combat damage to a player.

PASS if casting Solitude via Evoke exiles a white card from hand as the cost AND the ETB exiles a target creature with that creature's controller gaining life equal to its power; FAIL if the evoke cost (exiling a white card from hand) is not paid, or if the controller does not gain life equal to the exiled creature's power.

PASS if Goryo's Vengeance returns a LEGENDARY creature card from the graveyard to the battlefield with haste; FAIL if it can reanimate non-legendary creatures, or does not grant haste. (The end-step exile is mitigated by Ephemerate in this deck and is not required to pass.)

PASS if Ephemerate exiles a creature you control and returns it to the battlefield (re-triggering its ETB), AND the APL models Rebound (a free recast at the next upkeep); FAIL if it does not blink/return the creature or never models the Rebound recast.

PASS if Consign to Memory is used to counter a triggered ability or a colorless spell; FAIL if the APL uses it to counter an arbitrary colored spell (e.g. a generic monocolored creature/instant), which it cannot legally do.

PASS if Lava Dart deals 1 damage to any target and its Flashback is paid by sacrificing a Mountain (then the card is exiled); FAIL if the flashback cost is wrong (e.g. paid with generic mana) or Lava Dart deals the wrong amount of damage.

questions.principle: In a creature matchup, removal trades up: kill the opponent's value engine rather than burning their face.
questions.board_state: We are on the play, T2. Opponent has resolved Guide of Souls (a key energy/lifegain engine). We hold Lightning Bolt and have no pressing need to race.
questions.expected: PASS if the APL prefers pointing Lightning Bolt at the opposing creature (e.g. Guide of Souls) over going face in this spot; FAIL if it burns face by default while a relevant creature is on board.

questions.principle: Never sacrifice to Goblin Bombardment unless it is lethal, the creature is dying anyway (Mobilize tokens at end step), or it saves a creature; preserve board presence otherwise.
questions.board_state: Midgame, even board. Opponent at 6 life. We have Goblin Bombardment and 3 real creatures plus no expendable tokens; sacrificing 2 real creatures would be only 2 damage (not lethal).
questions.expected: PASS if the APL only sacrifices to Bombardment when it secures lethal or sacrifices tokens that are dying anyway; FAIL if it sacrifices real creatures for non-lethal chip damage.

questions.principle: Spend hard removal on the opponent's most threatening creature first.
questions.board_state: Opponent controls a 4/4 threat and a 1/1 token. We hold Static Prison and have mana to cast it.
questions.expected: PASS if Static Prison is aimed at the opponent's highest-power / most threatening creature (the 4/4) rather than a trivial token; FAIL if it exiles the weakest creature or chooses arbitrarily.

questions.principle: Vs a burn/prowess shell with free pingers (Lava Dart), do not deploy fragile 1-toughness creatures that die for free; lead on 2+ toughness bodies and the lifegain engine.
questions.board_state: Opponent is Izzet Prowess (Monastery Swiftspear, Lava Dart on board). We can deploy Guide of Souls (1/2), Ocelot Pride (1/1), or Ajani (2/1-class engine).
questions.expected: PASS if the APL detects the burn matchup and avoids deploying 1-toughness creatures into free removal, prioritizing safer bodies / the lifegain engine; FAIL if it deploys 1-toughness creatures indiscriminately into Lava Dart.

questions.principle: Blood Moon is devastating against nonbasic-heavy manabases (Amulet Titan, Domain, Eldrazi) and low-impact vs basic-heavy aggro (Prowess). Deploy it when the opponent leans on nonbasics.
questions.board_state: Opponent is Amulet Titan and controls multiple nonbasic lands (bounce lands, Urza's Saga). We hold Blood Moon.
questions.expected: PASS if the APL deploys Blood Moon when the opponent controls multiple nonbasic lands; FAIL if it ignores Blood Moon against a nonbasic-heavy board or fires it where it has no effect.

questions.principle: Reanimate the highest-impact legendary available (Atraxa for card advantage / Griselbrand for card draw) rather than a small body.
questions.board_state: Graveyard contains both Atraxa, Grand Unifier and a smaller legendary creature. We resolve Goryo's Vengeance.
questions.expected: PASS if the APL prioritizes reanimating the highest-impact legendary target (e.g. the highest mana value, Atraxa/Griselbrand) over a lesser creature; FAIL if it reanimates an arbitrary or weaker target.

questions.principle: Free Solitude evoke is best spent exiling a real opposing threat; do not waste it when there is no meaningful creature to remove.
questions.board_state: Opponent controls a 3/3 attacker (power >= 2). We hold Solitude and a spare white card to pitch.
questions.expected: PASS if the APL evokes Solitude to exile the opponent's significant creature (power >= 2) when one is present; FAIL if it never uses Solitude against a real threat or evokes it with no worthwhile target.

questions.principle: Use cheap removal (Lava Dart, Unholy Heat, Lightning Bolt) to kill the opponent's key creature / blocker rather than burning their face during setup turns.
questions.board_state: Opponent has a problematic blocker/engine creature on board. We have Lava Dart and Unholy Heat available and are not in a position to race to lethal this turn.
questions.expected: PASS if the APL aims its burn/removal at the opposing creature when killing it is correct (not yet lethal on board), rather than throwing damage at the opponent's face by default; FAIL if it always burns face regardless of board.

questions.principle: The deck's plan is to accelerate (Amulet of Vigor + bounce lands) toward casting Primeval Titan and fetching combo/utility lands as fast as possible.
questions.board_state: Early turns with Amulet of Vigor available and lands to deploy. The goal is to ramp toward Primeval Titan.
questions.expected: PASS if the APL uses Amulet of Vigor and land drops to accelerate mana and resolve Primeval Titan as the primary game plan; FAIL if it ignores acceleration or never works toward casting Primeval Titan.

questions.principle: Leyline Binding is cheap catch-all removal; spend it on the opponent's most dangerous nonland permanent.
questions.board_state: Opponent controls a large threat and a minor permanent. We hold Leyline Binding with domain online (cost reduced).
questions.expected: PASS if the APL aims Leyline Binding at the opponent's most threatening nonland permanent; FAIL if it exiles a trivial permanent or chooses arbitrarily while a real threat is present.

questions.hand: Sacred Foundry, Plains, Guide of Souls, Lightning Bolt, Monastery Swiftspear, Ocelot Pride, Screaming Nemesis
questions.expected: PASS if the keep() logic keeps this hand (2 lands, multiple one-drop threats and removal -> a textbook aggro keep under the 2-1-2 rule); FAIL if the code would mulligan it.

questions.hand: Guide of Souls, Lightning Bolt, Monastery Swiftspear, Ocelot Pride, Screaming Nemesis, Galvanic Discharge, Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer
questions.expected: PASS if the keep() logic mulligans this 0-land hand (lands == 0 -> return False); FAIL if it keeps a landless hand.

questions.hand: Sacred Foundry, Plains, Mountain, Arena of Glory, Inspiring Vantage, Lightning Bolt, Guide of Souls
questions.expected: PASS if the keep() logic mulligans this flooded 5-land hand (lands > 4 -> return False); FAIL if it keeps a hand with five lands and only two spells.

questions.hand: Sacred Foundry, Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer, Lightning Bolt, Guide of Souls, Ocelot Pride, Galvanic Discharge, Goblin Bombardment
questions.expected: PASS if the keep() logic keeps this hand (Ragavan with at least 1 land is an explicit snap-keep in the APL); FAIL if it mulligans a Ragavan-plus-land aggro hand.

questions.hand: Swamp, Island, Goryo's Vengeance, Atraxa, Grand Unifier, Ephemerate, Thoughtseize, Psychic Frog
questions.expected: PASS if the keep() logic keeps this assembled combo hand (Goryo's + a reanimation target + 2 lands, plus Ephemerate); FAIL if it mulligans a complete combo hand.

questions.hand: Goryo's Vengeance, Atraxa, Grand Unifier, Ephemerate, Psychic Frog, Quantum Riddler, Thoughtseize, Solitude
questions.expected: PASS if the keep() logic mulligans this 0-land hand (lands == 0 -> return False); FAIL if it keeps a landless hand even though it contains the combo pieces.

questions.hand: Steam Vents, Monastery Swiftspear, Expressive Iteration, Preordain, Mishra's Bauble, Lightning Bolt, Murktide Regent
questions.expected: PASS if the keep() logic keeps this 1-land hand (1 land + a threat + multiple card-advantage/cantrip fuel is an explicit keep in the APL); FAIL if it mulligans a 1-land hand loaded with cantrips and a one-drop threat.

questions.hand: Steam Vents, Island, Mountain, Preordain, Expressive Iteration, Lightning Bolt, Unholy Heat
questions.expected: PASS if the keep() logic mulligans this threat-light hand on the first decision (no prowess creatures / threats present -> return False before 2 mulligans); FAIL if it keeps a hand with zero threats.

questions.hand: Amulet of Vigor, Simic Growth Chamber, Forest, Primeval Titan, Arboreal Grazer, Summoner's Pact, Urza's Saga
questions.expected: PASS if the keep() logic keeps this hand (Amulet of Vigor + a bounce land + 2+ lands is an explicit snap-keep, and it also has a threat); FAIL if it mulligans a textbook Amulet acceleration hand.

questions.hand: Tropical Island, Sacred Foundry, Stomping Ground, Stubborn Denial, Prismatic Ending, Tribal Flames, Mishra's Bauble
questions.expected: PASS if the keep() logic mulligans this hand (no creatures/threats and no Leyline of the Guildpact -> return False); FAIL if it keeps a hand with no pressure.
